response_text:
ENTITY Passenger
PK passport
ATTR passport : varchar : PK
ATTR customer_name : varchar
ATTR customer_surname : varchar

ENTITY Airline
PK airline_code
ATTR airline_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_name : varchar

ENTITY Airport
PK airport_code
ATTR airport_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airport_name : varchar
ATTR airport_location : varchar
ATTR city : varchar

ENTITY City
PK city_name
ATTR city_name : varchar : PK

ENTITY Flight
PK flight_number
PK flight_date
ATTR flight_number : varchar : PK
ATTR flight_date : date : PK
ATTR seat_number : varchar
ATTR airplane_model : varchar
ATTR belt_number : varchar

ENTITY Airplane
PK license_number
ATTR license_number : varchar : PK
ATTR airplane_model : varchar

ENTITY CrewMember
PK license_number
ATTR license_number : varchar : PK
ATTR crew_role : varchar

ENTITY FlightStatus
PK status_code
ATTR status_code : varchar : PK
ATTR status : varchar

ENTITY FlightStatusLog
PK flight_number
PK flight_date
PK status_date
PK status_hour
ATTR flight_number : varchar : PK
ATTR flight_date : date : PK
ATTR status_date : date : PK
ATTR status_hour : time : PK
ATTR status_code : varchar : FK

REL Flight -> Airline : 1 -> 1..N : FK=airline_code
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1..N : FK=airport_departure
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1..N : FK=airport_arrival
REL Airport -> City : 1 -> 1..N : FK=departure_city
REL Airport -> City : 1 -> 1..N : FK=arrival_city
REL Flight -> FlightStatus : 1 -> 1..N : FK=status_code
REL Flight -> FlightStatusLog : 1 -> 1..N : FK=flight_number, flight_date
REL Flight -> Airplane : 1 -> 1..N : FK=airplane_model
REL Flight -> CrewMember : 1 -> 1..N : FK=license_number, crew_role
REL Flight -> Passenger : 1 -> 0..1 : FK=passport
